source.title: Limbo - Sarah Tomlinson (Toreador) Keely 3.5.1
source.localPath: source-sheets\Characters in Limbo\Limbo - Sarah Tomlinson (Toreador) Keely 3.5.1.xlsx

abilitySpecializations: the titles and ranks of the sect
Lores - Cam Law, Laws of Elysium

Print Sheet: Prey Exclusion - You don't hunt prostitutes, having grown up around them
Elite Influence - Art Dealers, Universities, Escorts, Museums
Dexterity - (Burst of Speed, Disarm, Fighting Blind, or Quick Draw)
Manipulation - +3 Social on Non Power uses dealing with focus.
Wits - +3 Mental on Non Power uses dealing with focus.
the titles and ranks of the sect
Lores - Cam Law, Laws of Elysium

* Earned XP in Game / Convention Game / 6 Game Bonus XP / What Was Bought *

rows: You've come a long way from the daughter of a common prostitute in the stews of London. You had ambition, and you figured out that quick wit and intellegence got you as far as beauty. You did your tour on the stage, as most up and comers did, and caught the eye of a duke's heir who had more money than sense. When he was done with you, there was an earl in the House of Lords, and then a marquis, and a string of other wealthy, influential men who set you up with the finest accomodations in London, showering you with more wealth than you thought possible. But it was more than wealth that interested you. You learned what it meant to run the shadow salons of London, and to hold court as a courtesan. You learned what good taste and breeding was, for all that you did not have it, and you showed yourself to have more elegance and intellegence than many of the wives of the Ton. This is what attracted your sire, a Toreador of the London court who felt you were the perfect childe to groom to sponsor the various salons and functions of Clan Toreador. With his help, and the influence of your patrons, you quickly came to be one of the more respected members of the Keeper of Elysium's coterie. Your salons were respected for their decorum and their taste. Unfortunately for you, however, for all of your elegance and intellegence, you could never really get ahead. You were old in years, but your generation was nothing compared to the elders in the London court, one that was ruled by the Ventrue. Realizing your options were limited, when someone whispered that the Ventrue of London might be willing to help sponsor your relocation to a new city, you were interested. You didn't expect it to be Los Angeles, California, a city on the edge of a war zone. That being said, they promise was simple. They had recently lost control of the domain. The Ventrue are eager to seek their dominance again, and are willing to help place you highly in the court if you can make it shine. You've heard rumors, nothing good, of this domain in Los Angeles, and frankly, you think it will take more than just a bit of a shine to make this gem sparkle, but you are up to the challenge. You are cultured, savvy, and well connected, something you doubt any of these vampires in this city are. And maybe, eventually, you can sit as the new Keeper.
Your relationship to these people is described. This may mean they do not know you.
You've heard of him by reputation, he's a pimp among the Ventrue. Given your history and your current goals, he would be a good first contact to make in the city.
Another Toreador, you understand he has experience as Assistant Keeper of Elysium. You may be able to work together to make you the new Keeper. If not, you'll have to neutralize him.
A Nosferatu also from London, you've been told to make contact with him as another potential resource.
#1: Establish yourself as the best, most refined and elegant hostess of the best parties in Los Angeles. You want other Kindred to fight each other for the privilege of attending your salons.
#2: Work your way into position as an Assistant Keeper of Elysium, with an eye towards eventually becoming Keeper yourself.
#3: Work with the Ventrue of Los Angeles. Help them regain what they've lost - though make sure they know who to thank when they're back on top.
